description: Grade 3 Creative Activities learning areas for art, music, movement, and performance.

learningAreas.title: Art and Craft
learningAreas.description: Create simple drawings, patterns, models, and crafts using available materials.

learningAreas.title: Music
learningAreas.description: Sing songs, keep rhythm, and listen for simple musical patterns.

learningAreas.title: Movement
learningAreas.description: Practise safe movement, coordination, balance, and simple games.

learningAreas.title: Drama
learningAreas.description: Use voice, movement, and role play to express ideas and stories.
